properties.descricao: Canadian unity takes centre stage at the Calgary Stampede as fears of a Brexit-style upset looms over the October vote on Alberta's future.

properties.titulo_evento: Paris landmarks to close early as France swelters under third heatwave since May

properties.titulo_evento: Spain: Wildfires that killed 12 begin to ease (officials)
properties.descricao: A wildfire that has killed at least 12 people in southern Spain showed signs of easing on Saturday, allowing firefighters to directly attack the flames for the first time, officials said. Our correspondent Sarah Morris tells us more.

properties.titulo_evento: EACOP: Ugandan farmers sue UK company in London
properties.descricao: Another legal setback for the massive EACOP oil pipeline. Four Ugandan farmers whose land lies directly along the pipeline's route, which is intended to connect Uganda to Tanzania, filed a lawsuit this week in London's High Court against the British...

properties.titulo_evento: Spain into World Cup semi-final with France after late strike against Belgium
properties.descricao: Spain struck late to beat Belgium 2-1 on Friday and move onto a blockbuster World Cup semi-final against France after a game decided by a goalkeeping error from Senne Lammens.

properties.titulo_evento: Spanish royals mark minute of silence for wildfire victims
properties.descricao:

properties.titulo_evento: 11 injured in overnight Russian missile and drone strikes on Kyiv
properties.descricao: At least 11 people, including a child, were injured after Russia launched an overnight missile and drone attack on Kyiv early Saturday. Our correspondent Gulliver Cragg tells us more.

properties.titulo_evento: World Cup 2022: Spain edge Belgium, set up semi-final showdown with France
properties.descricao: Spain booked their place in the World Cup semi-finals on Friday with a dramatic 2-1 victory over Belgium, sealed by a late winner from Mikel Merino. La Roja will now face France on Tuesday for a place in the final.

properties.titulo_evento: Death toll in Venezuela quakes surpasses 4,000

properties.titulo_evento: Russia hits Ukraine's Kyiv, Odesa in fresh attacks
properties.descricao: The strikes come with Ukraine running low on munitions needed to counter Russia's ballistic missiles. Ukrainian President Zelenskyy urged NATO members to deliver on promises made at the Ankara summit this week.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran's Mojtaba Khamenei vows revenge for father's killing
properties.descricao: Iran's supreme leader said Iran "demands" retribution for his father's assassination in an airstrike. Meanwhile, Trump has threatened to "completely decimate" Iran should it attempt to assassinate him. DW has more.

properties.titulo_evento: Poland could cut arms aid to Ukraine as WWII spat continues
properties.descricao: As Poland observes a day of remembrance for the victims of a Ukrainian nationalist military unit, there are increasing signs that it could cut off its neighbor from military aid, even as the war against Russia continues.

properties.titulo_evento: Cuba suffers second nationwide blackout in five days
properties.descricao: Cuba's electricity grid has crumbled amid a six-month US fuel blockade and already-dilapidated energy infrastructure.

properties.titulo_evento: Mayor of Berlin says he won't run for reelection
properties.descricao: Berlin Mayor Kai Wegner withdrew from the reelection race this fall. His decision to play tennis during the power outage in January was among missteps that has dented his reputation.

properties.titulo_evento: Trump signals support for Patriot production in Ukraine
properties.descricao: US President Donald Trump says he may let Ukraine produce Patriot air defense missiles. Analysts welcome the move as a sign of support for the country — but warn it could take years before production begins.

properties.titulo_evento: Passenger partly sucked from Ryanair plane during flight
properties.descricao: A man was nearly sucked out the cabin window on a Ryanair flight from Greece to Germany. An initial loud bang was followed by a desperate rescue effort to save the passenger.

properties.titulo_evento: Germany's richest man takes on Big Tech
properties.descricao: Dieter Schwarz made his fortune from supermarkets, becoming Germany's wealthiest person. Now he wants to take on Google, Microsoft and Amazon and an entire region stands to benefit.
